text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is the stage for my first direct
clash with the Golden Generation. Today, I cross
blades with...

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Special Week and Grass Wonder! I answer the
spirited gazes of these twin peaks of the Golden
Generation with this—"I shall be victorious."

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text: And now, ladies and gentlemen, it is time to begin the tumultuous Act II of Origins of the Centurial Overlord!
